# Apex Cloud Consulting

> Specialized cloud consulting firm for the automotive industry — serving OEMs, Tier-1 suppliers, and Connected Car platform providers. Note: This is a student educational project created at Hochschule Heilbronn; all company details and client references are fictional.

Apex Cloud Consulting GmbH delivers cloud transformation, connected car platforms, DevOps solutions, and security & compliance consulting. Our focus is exclusively on the automotive sector and its unique operational, regulatory, and architectural requirements.

## Services

- [Cloud Migration & Modernization](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/services): End-to-end cloud migration for automotive legacy on-premise environments. Covers lift-and-shift, re-platform, and re-architect methodologies for 24/7 production-critical systems with zero-downtime strategies.
- [DevOps & CI/CD Transformation](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/services): Embedding DevOps culture and CI/CD tooling across automotive engineering teams. Includes Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi, AWS CDK) and GitOps for OTA update platforms.
- [Data & Analytics Platforms](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/services): Scalable data lake and lakehouse architectures on AWS, Azure, or GCP for vehicle telematics. Real-time streaming architectures and self-service BI for automotive engineers and executives.
- [Connected Car Platform Engineering](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/services): Backend services for connected vehicles — OTA update infrastructure, MQTT/AMQP broker design, remote diagnostics, and GDPR-compliant vehicle data pipelines at scale.
- [SAP on Cloud](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/services): SAP S/4HANA migrations to hyperscaler platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) with zero business downtime. BTP integration and extension architecture, ECC-to-S/4HANA pathways.
- [Security & Compliance](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/services): TISAX readiness assessments, UNECE WP.29 cybersecurity compliance, zero-trust network architecture, and cloud security posture management (CSPM) for automotive organizations.

## Company

- [About Apex Cloud Consulting](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/about): Company story, mission statement, core values, team overview, and technology certifications (AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, TISAX).
- [Contact](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/contact): Offices in Munich, Germany (HQ) and Detroit, USA. Contact form for cloud strategy and project inquiries.

## Legal

- [Impressum](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/impressum): German legal notice (Impressumspflicht). This is a fictional student project from Hochschule Heilbronn — not a real commercial entity.
- [Privacy Policy / Datenschutz](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/datenschutz): GDPR/TTDSG-compliant privacy statement covering analytics, cookies, and data processing.
- [Terms & Conditions / AGB](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/agb): General terms and conditions for consulting engagements.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://apex-cloud-consulting.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap of all pages.
